title: The Knife-Grinder's Saint
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: In 1780s Prague, a Jewish knife-grinder who can read the history of any blade by touching its edge is hunted by a nobleman who wants him to authenticate a dagger that supposedly killed a saint.
long_description: In 1780s Prague, a Jewish knife-grinder who can read the history of any blade by touching its edge is hunted by a nobleman who wants him to authenticate a dagger that supposedly killed a saint.
